name: PocketSuite
long_description: PocketSuite is the all-in-one platform built for service businesses. From bookings and payments to client communication and beyond, we help owners and managers simplify their business and focus on what they do best. For more than a decade, thousands of independent professionals, small businesses, and multi-location brands have trusted PocketSuite to power their service businesses and serve hundreds of thousands of clients. We’re proud to support a diverse community of entrepreneurs at every stage of their journey. PocketSuite empowers the U.S. market of 20 million service businesses, generating $1 billion in sales with a desktop and mobile cloud solution for running their business. Thousands of businesses run on PocketSuite. Over 600,000 clients book, pay, and communicate with their service providers on PocketSuite today, and we're growing fast.
one_liner: All-In-One Business Operating System by PocketSuite

name: Solve
long_description: Solve (YCS17) provides airport fast track, customs, and concierge services in over 470 airports worldwide. Whether it's departure, arrival, or transit, we've got you covered.
one_liner: We save travelers hours by meeting them at their arrival gate,…

name: Convictional
long_description: Convictional (convictional.com) is the company OS that replaces Slack, to keep teams mission aligned by design. Your goals, email, meetings, chat and knowledge search in one place, where your team's effectiveness compounds.
one_liner: Convictional replaces Slack to keep teams mission aligned by design.

name: Vogent
long_description: Vogent is an all-in-one platform for building voice agents by using intelligent building blocks, including IVR detection models, custom phone-ready LLMs, drag-and-drop conversational flow builders, and more.
one_liner: Build Voice AI Agents

name: Nimbus
long_description: Our mission is to enable FANG-like observability for every organization in the world. We're starting with an optimization engine to reduce datadog costs by an order of magnitude without manual effort from developers.
one_liner: Nimbus reduces Datadog costs by more than 60% without Manual Effort

name: Sequin
long_description:
Sequin AI is building compliance-first AI voice agents to automate human agent intensive collections calls for consumer lenders and servicers.

CEO and Co-founder Vrinda Gupta, former Visa product leader who built the Chase Sapphire Reserve credit card and ran audits for top 10 issuers, teamed up with CTO and Co-founder Mark Thomas, former PayPal engineering leader, to bring world-class technology to consumer lending and servicing.

Backed by Y Combinator, Sequin AI has raised $5.7M from top investors, including executives at OpenAI, the Schwab family, and leading venture funds like Matrix, Commerce Ventures, and Thomvest - the same firms behind some of the most iconic technology companies of our time.

Reach out vrinda@sequinai.com to learn if Sequin's AI Voice Agents can dramatically reduce your cost of collections today.
one_liner: Sequin is building AI Voice Agents to automate collections calls for…

name: Ponyrun
long_description:
Ponyrun evaluates people for you. We help you answer questions like: Should you sell to them? Are they a good fit for your product? Should you interview them? 

Its easy to use. Give it a search URL or a list of people. Tell Ponyrun what you want to evaluate the person on. And Ponyrun will go through the person's information (e.g. LinkedIn), and evaluate them.
one_liner: Automate prospect research at scale

name: Postal
long_description:
Postal offers a modern virtual mailbox for businesses. Postal provides an official address for government, IRS, and vendor communications so companies don't have to use an apartment / shared office address.

Postal's AI summarizes mail and recommends compliance actions, and its marketplace of service providers are ready to perform the mundane compliance work that otherwise falls through the cracks. 

Companies get 6 months free (a $300 value), plus three free hours of compliance services (a $600 value).
one_liner: An AI native virtual address & mailroom for businesses.

name: BlueHill Payments
long_description:
BlueHill replaces the patchwork of tools you use to manage clients. Instead of bouncing between a project management app, a shared inbox, a portal solution, and a spreadsheet to track onboarding — BlueHill brings it all into one platform. Your team gets built-in email, structured onboarding workflows, project management, and a complete history of every client interaction. No more lost context, no more switching between tabs, and no more wondering who said what to which client.

Your clients get a branded portal experience where they can communicate with your team, track progress, and access everything they need — without the confusion of scattered tools and login links. Whether you're onboarding a new client, managing an ongoing project, or following up on a conversation from three months ago, BlueHill keeps everything connected so your team stays aligned and every client feels taken care of.
one_liner: Client management, communication, and projects in one platform.

name: Salient
long_description: Salient is an AI workflow automation tool for lenders. We're working with the largest auto lenders in America and are hiring!
one_liner: AI Servicing for Auto Lenders

name: Warp
long_description:
Warp is a modern, AI-native employee management platform for high-growth companies.

We’ve raised $25M from Sound Ventures (Ashton Kutcher), A-Star, Abstract, Drew Houston & Arash Ferdowsi (Dropbox), Balaji Srinivasan, Amjad Masad (Replit), Kyle Vogt (Cruise), SV Angel & Homebrew Capital.
one_liner: AI-native Employee Management Platform for High-Growth Companies

name: Remy
long_description: Remy automates insurance-related tasks for practices, starting with phone calls to verify patient benefits and check on claims.
one_liner: Making it simpler for medical clinics to work with insurance

name: Duckie
long_description:
Duckie lets customer support teams build their own AI agents in minutes! 

With Duckie, support teams can translate their tasks and processes into predictable and reliable AI workflows that saves them time and money. Folks use Duckie to handle a wide range of use cases, from answers customers technical questions to processing refunds, and everything in between.
one_liner: Build AI Support Agents in Minutes

name: Saga AI
long_description: Saga AI deploys voice agents for healthcare practices, ACOs, and health systems to handle scheduling, patient intake, and care gap outreach. Agents connect directly to your EHR in real time.
one_liner: Voice Agents for Healthcare Operations

name: Greenboard
long_description:
Greenboard is building a singular, AI-powered platform to handle management of the entirety of financial firms’ compliance programs, and eventually all back office processes. Today, financial institutions use Greenboard to detect risk using AI and to rip out and replace the bad legacy back office tooling they have wanted to get rid of for years.
 


Greenboard's mission is to enable financial institutions to operate their back office teams at a higher standard, with half of the headcount. We’re starting with compliance
one_liner: Modern OS for the financial back office.

name: Diana
long_description: The first business-ready OpenClaw platform. A secure AI assistant embedded directly into Slack.
one_liner: Give Your Employee An Employee

name: Pre
long_description:
Pre is an AI-powered execution system for startup founders who are serious about building real companies.
Set a 10-week goal, connect your tools, and get pushed to do your highest-impact work every week.
Pre doesn’t track effort… it tracks outcomes, and it holds you to a higher standard.
one_liner: The AI accountability agent for startup founders

name: Callback
long_description: Callback is AI-native business process outsourcing. We help our customers stay focused on their core business while we use AI to automate tasks like invoice processing, PDF report parsing, and data labeling.
one_liner: AI-native business process outsourcing

name: Modus
long_description:
Modus helps companies hire and retain only the people they need instead of becoming bloated messes. Modus connects your HRIS, ATS, and analyzes extensive data across your organization so leaders can detect, inspect, and correct their workforce plans - without relying on spreadsheets or complex systems. 
 
Lin experienced these challenges firsthand as a VP BizOps at HashiCorp, scaling from 100 employees to IPO, while Chris and Amar faced similar issues scaling 40+ person teams as a fractional CTO. They’re motivated by the belief that companies should have the least number of employees possible.
one_liner: Unlock revenue per employee with AI-powered headcount management

name: Intryc
long_description: Consumer enterprises have millions of customer support tickets annually. They need to constantly evaluate support agents’ performance and compliance. Typically they evaluate less than 5% of those interactions manually which is slow, expensive and not scalable. Intryc's AI can evaluate 100% of all customer interactions, in real time, at half the cost.
one_liner: Intryc uses AI to automate quality assurance for customer support

name: Simple AI
long_description: Simple AI is building AI voice that sells. Our voice agents know every detail about every product SKU. They’re trained on the best reps, so every call is handled at top-performer quality. Simple AI agents already outperform trained live reps by 30% on conversion and upsell.
one_liner: AI voice that sells

name: YouShift
long_description: YouShift uses AI to automate hospital shift scheduling, replacing legacy software and eliminating the need for full-time schedulers. And scheduling is just the beginning — we're building the future of healthcare workforce management.
one_liner: The OS for hospital workforce management

name: OrgOrg
long_description:
OrgOrg is a suite of apps that keeps teams productive and healthy regardless of the size of your organization. Founded by the creator of Zenter (YC 07, acquired by Google and became Google Slides), OrgOrg is designed to be a natural extension of Google Workspace Apps to help run organizations collaborate better leading to higher productivity.

Today the suite includes apps like:
  
• Go links: Go links allows anyone in the org to easily name any link so team members can jump directly to the information that matters most: go/sales, go/production, go/anything-you-want.
• Profiles with Personality: OrgOrg profiles are as insightful as they are delightful. They not only show you the expected org chart data, but also highlight accomplishments, how you like to work, and who you are as a person.
• Goal tracking: Track, share, and collaborate on "big rock" goals on the cadence that makes sense for your team from daily to annually.
• Branded New Tab: Keep the team focused the next major milestone, broadcast announcements, and keep important links top of mind every time a new browser tab is opened.
• All Hands Q&A: Crowdsource questions, anonymously if desired, for large team meetings to make sure everyone's voice is heard, and the most top of mind questions are answered and recorded.
• Smart Groups: Create rules based groups of people and use them to make sure the right people are in the right conversations and have the right access. For example, anyone with the title of "Software Engineer" should be in the #eng slack channel and eng@ google group.
• On-call: Schedule smart rotations that take into account balancing the load and using signals from calendar schedules to make sure you don't waste time figuring out who can cover what in a fair way. Easily page the on-call from slack, API, or OrgOrg directly.
• And more...

All the tools you need so you can spend more time focusing on your core business, and less time focusing on the complexity that comes from running an organization.
one_liner: Organizational productivity suite for companies

name: CopyCat
long_description: CopyCat builds AI specifically for the insurance industry. We help brokers, carriers, and MGA's move faster and more efficiently for what will soon be the next generation of insurance operations.
one_liner: AI agents built for insurance.

name: Acolite
long_description: Acolite builds AI teammates that handle submissions, issuing COIs, and SOV mapping across any AMS. Like an extra teammate, you simply forward an email and Acolite handles the rest.
one_liner: AI Teammates for Insurance Agencies

name: Flott HQ
long_description: Flott helps transport and logistics companies run leaner, smarter, and more profitable operations. Flott unifies everything transport and logistics teams need in a single, AI-powered control center—bringing planning, live tracking (gps, fuel, etc), invoicing, and payments into one place and delivering true end-to-end visibility. Flott’s AI agents act as an extension of fleet managers — automating repetitive tasks and optimizing workflows.This lets companies focus on what truly matters: growing the business.
one_liner: AI-native operating system for vehicle fleet management

name: Lumari
long_description:
Lumari is the world's first AI-powered procurement automation platform purpose-built for direct materials and supply chain execution. 

Backed by Y Combinator, Lumari is a well-funded startup that deploys 100s of always-on AI agents that run sourcing workflows, manage RFQs, expedite purchase orders, and coordinate supplier communication end-to-end -- compressing cycle times and giving teams full visibility into active orders, RFQs, and supplier performance.

Founded by engineers from Google, Tesla, Amazon, and Stripe who have built and scaled supply chain systems serving millions of users. 

Built to operate directly on top of existing tools and ERP systems, Lumari helps procurement teams move faster, eliminate operational bottlenecks, and build more resilient supply chains. No rip-and-replace, no supplier onboarding. Lumari handles the manual chase: quote follow-ups, PO confirmations, delivery status updates, and risk escalation.

Lumari helps companies from Fortune 500s to fast-growing startups automate work from sourcing to delivery, streamline supplier communication and order management, and bring full visibility to their procurement operations.

To learn more check out https://lumari.io/
one_liner: AI Digital Workers for Supply Chain

name: Lunavo
long_description:
We build AI that runs carrier operations.

Lunavo is the AI assistant for carriers. It plugs directly into their existing toolstack, understands their processes, and monitors all incoming data and requests. Lunavo runs end-to-end backoffice operations, handling repetitive tasks, resolving issues autonomously, and escalating only what matters.

Lunavo helps carriers scale operations without scaling headcount.
one_liner: Lunavo is the AI assistant for carriers.

name: Haladir
long_description:
Haladir is the operational AI layer for logistics. We unify and structure data across WMS, TMS, OMS, etc., and embed solver-grade optimization, ML models, RL environments for frontier AI labs, and forecasting into the decisions that power supply chains. Today's AI brought intelligence. The next frontier is judgement.

We define operational superintelligence as AI that consistently makes maximally-optimal operational decisions in complex environments. The first component is speed: continuous decisions that take operations managers and OR analysts weeks to make, in seconds. The second is reliability: every decision is guaranteed to satisfy operational constraints. The third is scope: optimize across thousands of constraints no human or team could possibly reason about.
one_liner: Building Operational Superintelligence.

name: Bubble Lab
long_description:
Bubble Lab turns natural language into visual, production-ready workflows — built for modern ops teams, with built-in observability, logs, and execution traces.

Deploy to Slack in one click so your team can build and run workflows from anywhere.
one_liner: Prompt once, automate forever.

name: Ontora
long_description: Ontora gives C-suite leaders AI agents that interview every employee to uncover process bottlenecks across their organization. Consultants spend months doing this manually; Ontora does it in hours.
one_liner: AI agents that interview every employee to map how work gets done.

name: Arzana
long_description: Fortune 500 companies and the fastest-growing manufacturing firms use Arzana’s AI platform to automate order entry, quoting, and customer updates. So teams can scale faster, respond sooner, and grow without adding overhead.
one_liner: AI automation for the manufacturing office
